text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 41 

HOS_STAYS 

LABEL: Hospice Stays 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of stays (unique admissions, which may span more than one facility) in the 
hospice setting for a given year. A hospice stay is defined as a set of one or more consecutive hospice 
claims where the beneficiary is only discharged on the most recent claim in the set. 

This algorithm includes all claims
